update_policy.local_checkout: Preferred when a sibling rnaseq checkout is present; record commit, branch, and dirty state.
update_policy.remote_repo: Allowed only with an explicit pinned version or tag; never use latest.

validation_required_before_update: Run the wrapper unit test suite.
Run preflight against a representative samplesheet.
Run the upstream demo profile when Nextflow and the selected backend are available.
Verify MultiQC, pipeline_info, count-matrix detection, provenance, and reproducibility outputs.
breaking_change_review: Review supported aligner and pseudo-aligner names.
Review output path conventions for merged TSVs, RDS, MultiQC, and pipeline_info.
Verify upstream nextflow.config defaults have not changed.
